summary: Adds a soft-launch snippet library foundation for reusable pipelines, hardens batch concurrency tests with deterministic synctest coverage, and improves ASCII chart value label consistency.
highlights: New snippet command family: snippet set, list, get, run, and delete
Snippet libraries are filesystem-backed and designed for scalable sharing and growth beyond local one-off command notes
Snippet command onboarding metadata and contract coverage are now in place for stable command-surface evolution
Horizontal ASCII bar chart values now render with fixed two-decimal labels (example 59.00)
Transform pipeline outputs now preserve upstream citation metadata so source attribution is retained after resample and other transform operations
batchGetObs and batchGetSeries now have deterministic synctest coverage for concurrency caps, order, warnings, and fallback behavior
Batch concurrency integration test no longer relies on time.Sleep and now uses deterministic request gating
Added Snippet Contracts integration section to verify snippet CLI help surface and core command behavior
update_instructions: Download the latest release from the GitHub releases page or rerun the install script from download.reservecli.dev.
